title: Orleanesia pleurostachys
taxonomy: Orleanesia pleurostachys is a species of orchid native to Brazil. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Orleanesia is part of the subtribe Zygopelmatinae, which is a subtribe of the tribe Cranichideae. The classification of Orleanesia pleurostachys places it within the family Orchidaceae, which is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants.
